The model establishes a prior authorization process for repetitive, scheduled non-emergent ambulance transports to reduce the utilization of services that do not comply with Medicare policy while maintaining or improving quality of care.
Rural Community Hospital Demonstration (RCH) - This program tests the feasibility and advisability of cost-based reimbursement for small hospitals that are too large to be Critical Access Hospitals. CMS is conducting an intensive evaluation of the
